event: preterm rupture of membranes of the first fetus
amniotic membrane of second twin intact
umbilical cord ligated high up in cervix
broad-spectrum antibiotics (Ampicillin and Gentamycin for 11 days)
serial ultrasonography revealed normal fetal growth
serial ultrasonography revealed wellbeing of second twin
admitted to Neonatal Intensive Care Unit
spontaneous respiration achieved at one month
